title: Whole of Government Accounts 2024 to 2025: guidance for preparers
body: "This page contains detailed guidance for local authorities, central government bodies and public corporations in England and Devolved Administrations who are required to complete Whole of Government Accounts returns.  Useful links (same links as last year)   access the OSCAR system  more information on the OSCAR system  to create an OSCAR account, or amend your current OSCAR access please refer to the User Management form on the OneFinance portal    find the Northern Ireland 24-25 WGA forms "
